mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HEALTH_PLANS ( PLAN_ID, USER_ID, HEALTH_RECORD_ID, RISK_ASSESSMENT_ID, TITLE, SUMMARY, DAILY_CALORIES, MEDICATION_NOTE, SOURCE, VERSION, IS_ACTIVE, IS_FAVORITE, AI_RAW_RESPONSE, DEL_FLAG, GENERATED_AT, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{planId}, #{userId}, #{healthRecordId}, #{riskAssessmentId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{dailyCalories}, #{medicationNote}, #{source}, #{version}, #{isActive}, #{isFavorite}, #{aiRawResponse}, 0, NOW(), NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE HEALTH_PLANS SET IS_ACTIVE = 0, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.select: SELECT PLAN_ID AS planId, USER_ID AS userId, TITLE AS title, SUMMARY AS summary, DAILY_CALORIES AS dailyCalories, MEDICATION_NOTE AS medicationNote, VERSION AS version, IS_FAVORITE AS isFavorite, GENERATED_AT AS generatedAt, AI_RAW_RESPONSE AS aiRawResponse FROM HEALTH_PLANS WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0

SELECT PLAN_ID AS planId, USER_ID AS userId, TITLE AS title, SUMMARY AS summary, DAILY_CALORIES AS dailyCalories, MEDICATION_NOTE AS medicationNote, VERSION AS version, IS_FAVORITE AS isFavorite, GENERATED_AT AS generatedAt, AI_RAW_RESPONSE AS aiRawResponse FROM HEALTH_PLANS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND IS_ACTIVE = 1 AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY GENERATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT PLAN_ID AS planId, VERSION AS version, DAILY_CALORIES AS dailyCalories, GENERATED_AT AS generatedAt, IS_FAVORITE AS isFavorite FROM HEALTH_PLANS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0 ORDER BY GENERATED_AT DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HEALTH_PLANS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE HEALTH_PLANS SET IS_FAVORITE = #{isFavorite}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE PLAN_ID = #{planId} AND DEL_FLAG = 0
